issues.title: Rachel's eye color changes
issues.description: Rachel Cole's eyes change from green to blue between chapters

locations.quote: striking red hair and green eyes
Her eyes were blue—a pale, watery blue

issues.title: Margaret's age inconsistency
issues.description: Margaret Cole's age is stated as ~60 in narration but 73 in her own dialogue

issues.title: Time Emma left pub contradicts
issues.description: Tom Reeves says Emma left at 11 PM, but David says around ten or ten-thirty

locations.quote: around ten, I think. Maybe ten-thirty

issues.title: Tom Reeves never interviewed
issues.description: Tom Reeves, the pub owner and last person to see Emma, is introduced but never interviewed by the detective

issues.title: Affair subplot never resolved
issues.description: David mentions rumors about Emma and Marcus having an affair, but this is never confirmed or denied

locations.quote: rumors about Emma and... and Marcus Webb

issues.title: Generational math doesn't work
issues.description: Marcus says 'great-great-grandfather' for 1892 logbook, but 4 generations back from 2020s only reaches ~1900

issues.title: Wednesday sighting contradiction
issues.description: Rachel claims she saw Emma at the store Wednesday, but earlier said she last saw Emma Thursday at midnight

locations.quote: I saw the clouds building Wednesday evening
I saw Emma Thursday night. Late.

issues.title: Sabotaged radio never explained
issues.description: The shortwave radio wires were 'cleanly cut' but the culprit is never identified

issues.title: Cole fortune reveal under-foreshadowed
issues.description: The revelation that the Cole family fortune was built on shipwreck gold comes without adequate setup

locations.quote: The gold from the Meredith built this island's economy

issues.title: Marcus having logbook under-foreshadowed
issues.description: Marcus reveals he has the crucial logbook all along with no prior setup

locations.quote: In his hand was a small leather journal

issues.title: Rachel's guilt telegraphed too heavily
issues.description: Rachel's nervousness ('hands trembling', 'not meeting Sarah's eyes') makes her guilt too obvious

issues.title: Shortwave call never explained
issues.description: Margaret's call about 'the Webb problem being solved' is never explained

issues.title: Captain Peters disappears after introduction
issues.description: Captain Peters and his gold tooth are described in detail but he never appears again

issues.title: Sarah's combat training comes from nowhere
issues.description: Sarah's 'fifteen years of training' for combat is mentioned only when she uses it

locations.quote: fifteen years of training against a lifetime of privilege

issues.title: Lighthouse operation timeline doesn't match
issues.description: Lighthouse 'turned off for the first time in fifty years' but Marcus only took over twelve years ago

locations.quote: turned it off for the first time in fifty years
